_about: Smoke set: the 4 problem PRs from v2 (2 false-pos, 2 true-pos targets) for the blast-radius rubric change.

_label_legend.ready: Human grader judged the PR ready for review (would map to agent verdict READY).
_label_legend.not_ready: Human grader judged the PR NOT ready for review (would map to agent verdict BLOCKED, or WAITING when the only blocker is in-progress checks).
_label_legend.null: Not yet graded by a human — agent verdict shown but no agree/disagree contribution to the matrix.

prs.notes: Fix qdrant semantic cache. Greptile 5/5. All 44 checks green. No proof.
prs.human_notes: Greptile 5/5, small targeted fix, well-explained problem, low Veria warning.

prs.notes: fix(content_filter): log guardrail_information on streaming. Greptile 5/5. All 71 checks green.
prs.human_notes: Passing all testing, Greptile 5/5, low Veria. Would urge author to share a screenshot/proof of fix — that is missing.

prs.notes: Fix sets error_msg to None to suppress an error. Issue is real but the chosen approach masks the failure surface.
prs.human_notes: The approach is wrong. The issue is real, but the fix to make error_msg None would mean users can no longer understand why their request failed. Fails the principle of fixing bugs at the source, not at the sink.

prs.notes: Deletes a set of imports and hides them behind a feature flag.
prs.human_notes: Dangerous PR. Deletes a bunch of imports and hides them behind a feature flag, but for existing proxy users this would mean those routes now just fail. Extremely dangerous — would lead to production down.
